dialog.title: Support Project
dialog.description: Thank you for using the website! This is a completely free personally maintained project. If you find it helpful, please consider supporting the project to help maintain and improve the website.
dialog.supportMessage: Your support is the driving force for continuous project improvement

success.title: 🎉Congratulations! Generation Successful!🎉
success.description: If you find this tool helpful, please consider supporting the project to help maintain and improve the website.

vanityAddress.title: 🎉Congratulations! Vanity Address Generated!🎉
vanityAddress.description: If you enjoy the generated vanity addresses, please consider supporting the project to help maintain and improve the site.

batchWallet.title: 🎉Congratulations! Batch Addresses Generated!🎉
batchWallet.description: If you find this batch address generator helpful, please consider supporting the project to help maintain and improve the website.

pattern.title: Generation Settings

input.label: Input custom uppercase letters you want to generate, e.g.: QUBIC
input.placeholder: Enter address prefix or suffix to generate

cpuUsage.label: Performance
cpuUsage.tooltip: Adjust performance to balance generation speed and system response

forceStart.label: Force Start
forceStart.tooltip: Force start mode will ignore network connection status but may have security risks

pattern.offlineNotice: Offline generation only ensures generation process security, please keep your seed safe
pattern.networkAlert: For security reasons, it's recommended to use this tool offline

info.title: Generation Information
info.recommendedLength: Recommended letter count should not exceed 5, generation time increases exponentially with difficulty

result.title: Generation Result
result.warning: Seed information will not be saved, please import to mobile wallet promptly
result.warningClipboard: To prevent seed leakage from clipboard, please use Qubic official mobile wallet to scan QR code for import

settings.title: Batch Address Generation
settings.offlineNotice: Offline generation only ensures generation process security, please keep your seed safe

forceStart.label: Force Start
forceStart.tooltip: Force start mode will ignore network connection status but may have security risks

count.label: Generation Count
count.placeholder: Please enter the number of wallets to generate

mobile.description: To prevent seed leakage from clipboard, it is recommended to use Qubic official mobile wallet to scan QR code for import

results.title: Generation Results
results.notice: Seed information will not be saved, please import to Qubic official mobile wallet or export table in time
results.scan: Use Qubic official mobile wallet to scan QR code to import seed

toast.invalidCount: Please enter a valid wallet count
toast.networkError: For security reasons, please generate addresses in offline environment

addressList.label: Address List (One per line)
addressList.placeholder: Enter addresses to query, one per line

noProposal.title: No Proposals
noProposal.description: There are currently no proposals to vote on

calculator.title: Profit Calculator
calculator.tip: For data accuracy, please query during non-idle time

networkStatus.offline: Network disconnected, please use incognito mode
networkStatus.online: Please disconnect network and use incognito mode
